name: Browser DevTools
description: Remote browser tools for navigation, screenshots, console JavaScript, and Puppeteer automation.

schemes.label: Browserless API token
schemes.instructions: Create a Browserless API token at browserless.io. The app calls the Browserless /function endpoint to run Puppeteer in a managed browser.

tools.name: snapshot_page
tools.description: Navigate to a page and return title, status, visible text, headings, links, console output, page errors, and failed requests.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Navigate to a page and return a PNG screenshot of the viewport, full page, or CSS selector.

tools.name: run_console_javascript
tools.description: Navigate to a page and execute JavaScript as if pasted into DevTools Console.

tools.name: automate_browser
tools.description: Run a trusted Puppeteer script for multi-step browsing, clicking, extraction, and debugging.
